title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes four strategies Anthropic's growth team used with Claude Code to achieve rapid company scaling. He identifies automation of workflows, enabling previously sub-threshold work, building bespoke tools, and using AI as a thought partner as key leverage points, while highlighting a common ceiling where AI can become more work than benefit.
